_instructions: Add product names (exactly as in db.js) mapped to Newegg image URLs.
_howto: 1) Run: node scripts/fetch-newegg-images.cjs  2) Search Newegg for the product  3) Copy item code from URL (e.g. N82E16814126682 → 14-126-682)  4) Add entry below  5) Run: node scripts/apply-newegg-images.cjs
